canonical_definition: The behavior of applying a continuous prompt learned on one language model to a different target model, with or without transformation, to perform the same task.
papers: DP-OPT: Make Large Language Model Your Privacy-Preserving Prompt Engineer
Zero-Shot Continuous Prompt Transfer: Generalizing Task Semantics Across Language Models
